input.command: gh api 'repos/patflynn/reel-life/pulls/36/comments' --paginate 2>&1 && echo "---" && gh api 'repos/patflynn/reel-life/pulls/36/reviews' --jq '.[] | select(.state != "COMMENTED") | {user: .user.login, state: .state, body: .body}' 2>&1
input.description: Check for inline review comments and non-comment reviews

content.text:
There are no review comments to address on PR #36. The only review is from `gemini-code-assist[bot]` which left a "COMMENTED" state review saying "I have no feedback to provide." There are no inline comments, no issue-level comments, and no requested changes from any reviewer.

The PR is clean — no action needed.
